title: Khulna Heat Wave
lead: Khulna is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.57. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khulna has resulted in a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 15.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 67% and the wind speed is approximately 22.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's energy demand is expected to surge due to increased use of cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
